sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْفُحُوصَاتُ الطِّبِّيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الْكَشْفِ الْمُبَكِّرِ عَنِ الْأَمْرَاضِ قَبْلَ تَفَاقُمِهَا.
sentences.translation: Redovni medicinski pregledi predstavljaju kamen temeljac u ranom otkrivanju bolesti prije nego što se one pogoršaju.
sentences.translationEn: Periodic medical check-ups represent the cornerstone of early disease detection before they worsen.

sentences.arabic: يُتِيحُ الذَّهَابُ إِلَى الْمُسْتَشْفَى لِإِجْرَاءِ تَحَالِيلَ شَامِلَةٍ لِلْأَطِبَّاءِ فَهْمَ الْحَالَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ لِلْمَرِيضِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odlazak u bolnicu radi obavljanja sveobuhvatnih analiza omogućava ljekarima da precizno razumiju zdravstveno stanje pacijenta.
sentences.translationEn: Going to the hospital to perform comprehensive tests allows doctors to accurately understand the patient's health status.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْوِقَايَةَ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ، وَهَذَا الْمَبْدَأُ يَدْفَعُنَا لِلِاهْتِمَامِ بِالنَّظَافَةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ وَأَخْذِ اللَّقَاحَاتِ اللَّازِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prevencija je bolja od liječenja, a ovaj princip nas tjera da brinemo o ličnoj higijeni i primamo potrebne vakcine.
sentences.translationEn: Prevention is better than cure, and this principle drives us to care for personal hygiene and take the necessary vaccines.

sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ التَّوْعِيَةُ الصِّحِّيَّةُ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ دَوْرًا هَامًّا فِي تَقْلِيلِ نِسَبِ انْتِشَارِ الْأَوْبِئَةِ وَالْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُعْدِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zdravstvena svijest u zajednici igra važnu ulogu u smanjenju stope širenja epidemija i zaraznih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Health awareness in society plays an important role in reducing the spread rates of epidemics and infectious diseases.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، فَإِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الرِّعَايَةِ الْوِقَائِيَّةِ يُوَفِّرُ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْجُهْدِ وَالتَّكَالِيفِ الْعِلَاجِيَّةِ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, ulaganje u preventivnu njegu štedi mnogo truda i troškova liječenja u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, investing in preventive care saves a lot of effort and treatment costs in the future.
